title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete - dialog
scenario: Account delete dialog does not match Figma design when accessed from App Settings > General > Account
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the Account icon or menu to access Account settings.
4. Go to App Settings → General → Account.
5. Locate and tap the delete icon (trash icon) next to the account.
6. Observe the delete confirmation dialog that appears.
expected: A delete confirmation dialog is displayed that matches the Figma design specifications (correct layout, text, button labels, spacing, and styling).
